data.name: StrokeMoveModeLabel
data.comment: Combo label: how moving a point carries the rest of its stroke.

data.name: StrokeModeRigid
data.comment: Stroke move mode: the whole stroke slides by the full delta, keeping its exact shape.

data.name: StrokeModeTaper
data.comment: Stroke move mode: influence fades linearly to zero at the stroke's start (turning point pinned).

data.name: StrokeModeSmooth
data.comment: Stroke move mode: influence fades with easing at both ends for the most organic bend.

data.name: ApproachShape
data.comment: Label for the shaped-approach easing preset dropdown.

data.name: ShapeSnapEarly
data.comment: Shaped Approach preset: jump most of the way to the target, then settle.

data.name: ShapeEaseOut
data.comment: Shaped Approach preset: move quickly, then decelerate onto the target.

data.name: ShapeLinear
data.comment: Shaped Approach preset: a straight ramp to the target.

data.name: ShapeEaseIn
data.comment: Shaped Approach preset: start slow, then accelerate toward the target.

data.name: ShapeSnapLate
data.comment: Shaped Approach preset: linger near the start, then jump late to the target.

data.name: ApproachSteps
data.comment: How many points are injected to form the approach curve.

data.name: PluginName
data.comment: The plugin's display name (window title / plugin list).

data.name: NodeShapeCurve
data.comment: Display name of the Shape Curve processing node.

data.name: ParamGamma
data.comment: Shape Curve node: gamma slider label.

data.name: ParamInvert
data.comment: Shape Curve node: invert checkbox label.

data.name: ShapeModeName
data.comment: Footer edit-mode selector entry: applies the panel's Alternating / Shaped Approach behavior.

data.name: SelectModeDisclaimer
data.value: Select "{0}" as the edit mode in the footer to use these settings.
data.comment: Shown above the (greyed-out) panel when the plugin's edit mode is not active. {0} is the mode name (ShapeModeName).

data.name: SelectModePeaksName
data.comment: Footer Select selector entry: a box selection keeps only the stroke's turning points (peaks).

data.name: SectionPeaks
data.comment: Panel section title for the shared peak setting (used by both the Peaks-only selection mode and the Peak navigator).

data.name: PeaksDisclaimer
data.value: Activate the "Peaks only" Select mode or the Peaks navigator in the footer to use this setting.
data.comment: Shown above the (greyed-out) peak setting when neither the Peaks-only selection mode nor the Peak navigator is active.

data.name: NavPeaksName
data.comment: Footer Step selector entry: the prev/next-action keys step between the stroke's turning points (peaks).

data.name: PeakSelectLabel
data.comment: Peaks panel: combo label for which extrema the peak features keep / step between.

data.name: PeakKindBoth
data.comment: Peaks-only Select combo: keep every turning point (both maxima and minima).

data.name: PeakKindTops
data.comment: Peaks-only Select combo: keep only the upper turning points (local maxima).

data.name: PeakKindBottoms
data.comment: Peaks-only Select combo: keep only the lower turning points (local minima).
